model_name: MobileNetV2 clean 11-class banana nutrient deficiency classifier

preprocessing.android_contract: Decode RGB image, resize to 224x224, convert pixels from [0,255] to float32 [-1,1] using (pixel / 127.5) - 1.0.

limitations: Nitrogen and phosphorous are maize-derived supplemental classes, not banana-specific validated classes.
Manganese, iron, and magnesium remain weak or low-support classes.
Prototype is not field-validated and is not a validated agronomic decision product.

conversion.quantization: none; float32 baseline for first Android integration
